title: eupatorium foliatum
intro: Eupatorium foliatum, also known as Thoroughwort or Folium Eupatorii, is a plant species native to North America, characterized by its unique leaf structure and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and terpenoids, which have been traditionally used for their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Eupatorium foliatum is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for easy incorporation into a holistic health regimen.
